21.reason: [The 'else' only applies to the last 'if' (isdigit), not the entire group. This causes '-' to be printed even when one of the earlier conditions (like islower or isupper) was true, leading to duplicate output or incorrect behavior. Also, potential out-of-bounds access when i=0 or i at end.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 1.0 , reason:  [The 'else' only applies to the last 'if' (isdigit), not the entire group. This causes '-' to be printed even when one of the earlier conditions (like islower or isupper) was true, leading to duplicate output or incorrect behavior. reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 1.0 , reason:  [The 'else' only applies to the last 'if' (isdigit), not the entire group. This causes '-' to be printed even when one of the earlier conditions (like islower or isupper) was true, leading to duplicate output or incorrect behavior. Additionally, no bounds checking is done for i-1 or i+1, which can cause out-of-bounds access when '-' appears at the start or end of the string.]
